info.title: MNI News API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for MNI News endpoints

name.description: Display name of the concept item

visibility.description: Visibility level of the concept item

outgoingRelationships.description: Outgoing relationships to other concept items

attributes.description: Additional attributes of the concept item

canDisplayAsHeadlines.description: Whether section can be displayed as headlines

authorized.description: Whether user is authorized for this section

get.description: Retrieve articles. Supports pagination, filtering by subjects/genres/sections, and product-based access control.

parameters.name: excludeSubjects
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of subject codes to exclude

parameters.name: excludeGenres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre codes to exclude

parameters.name: includeSubjects
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of subject codes to include

parameters.name: includeGenres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre codes to include

parameters.name: includeKeywords
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of keywords to include

parameters.name: updatedAfter
parameters.description: Filter articles updated after this date (timestamp in milliseconds or date string)

parameters.name: updatedBefore
parameters.description: Filter articles updated before this date (timestamp in milliseconds or date string)

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET 'https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles?section=YOUR_SECTION&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&teaser=YOUR_TEASER&short=YOUR_SHORT' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'

import requests

url = "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles?section=YOUR_SECTION&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&teaser=YOUR_TEASER&short=YOUR_SHORT"
headers = {
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
  "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())

<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
  CURLOPT_URL => "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles?section=YOUR_SECTION&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&teaser=YOUR_TEASER&short=YOUR_SHORT",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => "",
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 30,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => "GET",
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
  "$k: $v",
  "$k: $v"
]
]);

$response = curl_exec($curl);
$err = curl_error($curl);

curl_close($curl);

if ($err) {
  echo "cURL Error #:" . $err;
} else {
  echo $response;
}

get.description: Retrieve a specific article by its external Id.

404.description: Article not found or access denied

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET 'https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles/YOUR_ID' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'

import requests

url = "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles/YOUR_ID"
headers = {
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
  "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())

<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
  CURLOPT_URL => "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/articles/YOUR_ID",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => "",
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 30,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => "GET",
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
  "$k: $v",
  "$k: $v"
]
]);

$response = curl_exec($curl);
$err = curl_error($curl);

curl_close($curl);

if ($err) {
  echo "cURL Error #:" . $err;
} else {
  echo $response;
}

get.description: Search articles with advanced filtering options. Supports full-text search, filtering by sections/subjects/genres, and sorting by relevance or date.

parameters.name: excludeSubjects
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of subject codes to exclude

parameters.name: excludeGenres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre codes to exclude

parameters.name: includeSubjects
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of subject codes to include

parameters.name: includeGenres
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of genre codes to include

parameters.name: includeKeywords
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of keywords to include

parameters.name: updatedAfter
parameters.description: Filter articles updated after this date (timestamp in milliseconds or date string)

parameters.name: updatedBefore
parameters.description: Filter articles updated before this date (timestamp in milliseconds or date string)

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X GET 'https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/search/articles?q=YOUR_Q&section=YOUR_SECTION&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&sort=YOUR_SORT&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&advancedSearch=YOUR_ADVANCEDSEARCH' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'

import requests

url = "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/search/articles?q=YOUR_Q&section=YOUR_SECTION&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&sort=YOUR_SORT&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&advancedSearch=YOUR_ADVANCEDSEARCH"
headers = {
  "Content-Type": "application/json",
  "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())

<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
  CURLOPT_URL => "https://apis.marketnews.com/api/v1/news/search/articles?q=YOUR_Q&section=YOUR_SECTION&excludeSubjects=YOUR_EXCLUDESUBJECTS&excludeGenres=YOUR_EXCLUDEGENRES&includeSubjects=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTS&includeSubjectsType=YOUR_INCLUDESUBJECTSTYPE&includeGenres=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRES&includeGenresType=YOUR_INCLUDEGENRESTYPE&includeKeywords=YOUR_INCLUDEKEYWORDS&page=YOUR_PAGE&size=YOUR_SIZE&sort=YOUR_SORT&updatedAfter=YOUR_UPDATEDAFTER&updatedBefore=YOUR_UPDATEDBEFORE&advancedSearch=YOUR_ADVANCEDSEARCH",
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => "",
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 30,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => "GET",
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
  "$k: $v",
  "$k: $v"
]
]);

$response = curl_exec($curl);
$err = curl_error($curl);

curl_close($curl);

if ($err) {
  echo "cURL Error #:" . $err;
} else {
  echo $response;
}

get.description: Retrieve a specific concept item by its qcode.

200.description: Successful response with concept item metadata

404.description: Concept item not found or not public

get.description: Retrieve the hierarchical sections tree with product authorization information.

canDisplayAsHeadlines.description: Whether section can be displayed as headlines

authorized.description: Whether user is authorized for this section

x-codeSamples.source:
